anvilcraft.ponder.block_comparator.text_: 右擊之而入精式者，其謹較赭塊方之同也。
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer.text_1: Block Placer can place blocks in front of it when powered by redstone.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer.text_2: It can also read the items in the container.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer.text_3: If the block placer is blocked by a mob, it will not place the block.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_placer_anvil.tex: Block Placer can place blocks with anvil.
The higher the anvil falls, the farther the blocks are placed. The farthest is 5 grids.
When the placer is followed by another placer, they can share containers.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_1: When the anvil hits the spawner, it will be forced to work. But there are still constraints, such as light, number of mob.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_2: The higher the height of the anvil, the higher the probability of success.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_3: When the anvil strikes the red stone, a red stone EMP occurs, extinguishing the nearby red stone torches for an instant.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_4: The higher the anvil falls, the larger the range.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_process.text_5: Press the lead into the vault to reset it.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_1: When the anvil hits a specific block, the block is crushed.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_2: When the anvil hits the block with an item on it, press the item into the block.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_3: When the anvil hit the block on the stone cutter, the block was destroyed.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_4: The Royal Anvil can precisely destroy blocks.
anvilcraft.ponder.block_recipe.text_5: The Ember Anvil can melt blocks.
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_1: A normal funnel can only transmit one item at a time
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_2: Whereas chutes can transfer a set of items at once
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_3: and can be thrown as drops
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_4: When the chute output position is blocked by a block, the item will stop outputting
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_basics.text_5: When there is an identical set of drops under the chute, the item will not continue to be thrown
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_filtering.text_1: Right-click the chute to open the filter settings interface
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_filtering.text_2: Set it allow only diamonds to pass through
anvilcraft.ponder.chute_filtering.text_3: The chute will only let the set item pass through and will not absorb items outside of the filter condition
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.header: Use heater to execute the high-heat recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_1: When placing down the heater, it will not work if there is no valid power grid nearby or if the grid is already overloaded.
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_2: It requires 16 kW of power to operate.
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_3: Assuming we are now connected to a valid power grid...
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_4: The heater is now working properly.
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_5: Place a cauldron on the heater
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_6: Drop some raw minerals into the cauldron...
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_7: Use an anvil or the Anvil Hammer to strike the cauldron.
anvilcraft.ponder.heater.text_8: It will execute the high-heat recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.header: Use Impact Pile to generate Mineral Fountain.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_1: Impact piles are consumables used to create a mineral fountain.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_2: To work properly, it must be placed no higher than 8 blocks above the world’s bottom.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_3: And it must be placed on bedrock or deepslate.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_4: Then strike it with an undamaged anvil dropped from at least 20 blocks high.
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_5: When the conditions are met, the anvil and the impact pile will be consumed...
anvilcraft.ponder.impact_pile.text_6: and a mineral fountain will be generated.
anvilcraft.ponder.iron_trapdoor.header: Use Iron Trapdoor to trigger unpack Recipe
anvilcraft.ponder.iron_trapdoor.text_1: You can use the iron trapdoor to disassemble composite items into their components.
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet_magnetize_ingot: 礠石錠棄入空心礠石塊
anvilcraft.ponder.magnet_power_generatio: 礠石推而摩銅塊則生電荷。
A normal chute drops items directly downward
Magnetic chutes attract items from behind and propel them forward
When items are ejected, they're given forward momentum
anvilcraft.ponder.magnetic_chute_connect: Regular chutes still transform into simple chutes when connected to magnetic chutes
But magnetic chutes don't transform into simple chutes when connected to other magnetic chutes
anvilcraft.ponder.magnetic_chute_filteri: Right-click the magnetic chute to open the filter settings interface
Set it to allow only diamonds to pass through
The magnetic chute will only let the set item pass through and will not absorb items outside of the filter condition
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_1: When one chute is connected to the output direction of another chute, it becomes a simple chute
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_2: The simple chute can receive items from other chutes from multiple directions
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_3: Normal chutes are locked by redstone signals
anvilcraft.ponder.simple_chute.text_4: The simple chute will not be locked by the redstone signal
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_blocks.te: Blocks can also slide on sliding rails when pushed by pistons
However, blocks that cannot be pushed by pistons also cannot slide on rails
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_items.tex: Sliding rails have extremely smooth surfaces that allow items to slide without friction
Items can slide infinitely far until they reach the end of the rail or are collected
anvilcraft.ponder.sliding_rail_multi_blo: Sliding rails can handle multiple blocks
Slime blocks can stick multiple blocks together to form a sliding structure
The entire multi-block structure slides together along the rails
anvilcraft.ponder.space_overcompressor.h: 空間超壓械以製中子錠
anvilcraft.ponder.space_overcompressor.t: 壓大質之物入之以累質。
空間超壓械䃮足質則成一中子錠。其可逾蕃塊，故需以終界塵之屬物以止之也。
anvilcraft.ponder.tag.logistics_componen: Various item transfer and storage components
anvilcraft.ponder.transmission_pole.head: Use Transmission Pole to transmitting electricity
block.anvilcraft.void_energy_collector.p: Too close to another void energy collector
enchantment.anvilcraft.beheading.desc: 增凋靈骷髏落首之率，落他生之首。
enchantment.anvilcraft.harvest.desc: 收域內之作並復植，上隨等增。
enchantment.anvilcraft.smelting.desc: 煉塊方之落於絲觸與運後，倍冶之率增以等。
gui.anvilcraft.category.beacon_conversio: 以此塊方為烽火臺之基
gui.anvilcraft.category.mob_transform: 腐化烽火臺光柱內生物之轉
gui.anvilcraft.category.void_decay.aroun: 置此塊方於中心之塊側
gui.anvilcraft.category.void_decay.rando: 收天命刻而中心之塊方轉
item.anvilcraft.amethyst_pickaxe.tooltip: 石鎬之質，可劚鐵而不可劚金鋼之石！
jei.anvilcraft.info.capacitor: 藉蓄械以蓄空電容而得之
jei.anvilcraft.info.end_dust: 任墜方而砧、龍卵除入門則化終界塵。
jei.anvilcraft.info.geode_1: 施用以覓周之紫晶洞焉
jei.anvilcraft.info.mob_transform_with_i: 右擊生物以方中之物可強之持之。
jei.anvilcraft.info.royal_steel_upgrade_: 得於鄉肆武工舍箱中匠
message.anvilcraft.code_gen_check: 審所選之地是否立方，驗輸出之槽積物與否。
message.anvilcraft.disk.data_applied: 已應礠碟既貯之置設於塊方
message.anvilcraft.disk.data_incompatibl: 此塊方不容礠碟既貯之置設
message.anvilcraft.disk.data_stored: 已貯塊方之置設於礠碟

screen.anvilcraft.ember_smithing.four.mi: 入共振之心、重戟之心、多相逾矩金或浮霜金屬塊
screen.anvilcraft.ember_smithing.heavy_h: 入同型之劍斧，及三叉戟並椎
screen.anvilcraft.ember_smithing.multiph: 入一鉸、一燧鐮、一刷、一望遠鏡、一礠石、一漁竿、一胡蘆菔釣竿並一譎蕈釣竿
入一餘燼金屬重戟並一浮霜金屬重戟
入一餘燼金屬共振械或重戟並一浮霜金屬共振械或重戟
入一餘燼金屬共振械並一浮霜金屬共振械
screen.anvilcraft.ember_smithing.resonat: 入同之餘燼金屬或浮霜金屬之具
screen.anvilcraft.item_collector.title: 集械
screen.anvilcraft.multiphase.title: 易相
screen.anvilcraft.multitool.title: 易具
screen.anvilcraft.resonator.title: 易共振之式
screen.anvilcraft.royal_grindstone.title: 祛咒與消懲
screen.anvilcraft.smithing_template.embe: 置餘燼金屬錠或餘燼金屬塊
皇家鐵砧錘，玄鈺具，皇家鋼具，皇家鍛塊
置餘燼金屬錠或餘燼金屬塊

砧、鍛案、礪、砧錘、紫水玉具、金具、鐵具、金剛具
screen.anvilcraft.smithing_template.tran: 置逾矩金塊錠或逾矩金塊
餘燼金屬砧、餘燼砧錘、餘燼龍杖
screen.anvilcraft.structure_tool.convers: 置另一結構具以生多塊方轉之方
screen.anvilcraft.structure_tool.regular: 置任普物以生多塊方轉之方
tooltip.anvilcraft.heat.title: 熱計：
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.amulet_box.line_: 右擊以納囊中保命符，潛而右擊以取之；
持則耗其當需，可得秘禮。
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.anvil_hammer: 為鎚，為砧，為曲錐，為護目鑠，亦為重槌
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.batch_crafter: 收赤石之號則即製中全物，耗能功率四千瓦特
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.block_devourer:
激以赤石時：
    食前三方之塊。
激以砧時：
    墜一米 -> 五方
    墜二米 -> 七方
無容而出物於後之塊方、實體之囊或生落物於此背。石、土、焱界石、終界石之屬之天地本塊非全落
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.block_placer: 激赤石則置於前，擊鐵砧則置於元。無容而取物其後。
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.brass_pressure_p: 出赤石之號於上戲者之囊充者也，亦一黃銅板者也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.bronze_pressure_: 出赤石之號於上戲者之饑飽者也，亦一青銅板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.copper_pressure_: 增赤石之號隨壓之時者也，亦一銅板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.crab_trap: 置於水中佑爾捕拾水物
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.disk.store: 右擊塊方以複製其置設
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.ember_anvil_hamm: 為錘、為砧、為具、為目鏡、亦為椎
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.exposed_copper_p: 增赤石之號隨壓之時者也，亦一銅板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.ferrite_core_mag: 鐵砧下引，而韝鞴之推拉，致鄰之銅塊生電也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.geode: 用之際，覓旁之紫玉窟（地物）也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.heliostats:
持定日鏡右擊玄鈺塊或鎢塊以定其耀斑
置則晝熱之
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.hollow_magnet_bl: 鐵砧下引，而韝鞴之推拉，致鄰之銅塊生電也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.induction_light:
明則耗能功率一千瓦特
赤石末右擊之則催熟之式
硄砂右擊之則辟邪之式
太虛質右擊之則抑生之式
上三式則耗能功率十六千瓦特
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.ionocraft_backpa:
著則飛如創
需能網供或囊有能容而常用
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.item_collector: 易其功耗以集域時隔，域則卅至百又五十千瓦特
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.lead_pressure_pl: 出赤石之號以上生物之種者也，亦一鉛板者也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.magnet: 用之際，周遭之物皆為其所引
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.magnet_block: 鐵砧下引，而韝鞴之推拉，致鄰之銅塊生電也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.negative_matter: 負質者，非反質者也，反重之質者也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.negative_matter_: 負質者，非反質者也，反重之質者也
負質者，非反質者也，反重之質者也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.neutronium_ingot: 過多塊而阻以終界塵、負質塊、基石者也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.oxidized_copper_: 增赤石之號隨壓之時者也，亦一銅板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.plutonium_pressu: 出赤石之號以上戲者所持物之損者也，亦一钚板也。
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.power_converter_: 化能為通量，耗能卅六千瓦特
化能為通量，耗能六千瓦特
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.resin_block: 於和睦之物或虚疲之怪施之以捕
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.royal_anvil_hamm: 為鎚，為砧，為具，為目鏡，亦為重錘
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.silver_pressure_: 出赤石之號以上亡物之數者也，亦一銀板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.structure_tool.i: 出入之多塊方結構之尺寸須同也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.structure_tool.m: 選域邊長須單而不逾十五
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.tesla_tower: 電擊八米內之生物，耗能功率百又廿八千瓦特
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.tin_can: 錫罐可合與食得罐食也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.tin_pressure_pla: 出赤石之號以上生物之極小命率者也，亦一錫板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.titanium_pressur: 出赤石之號以上物之極大損率者也，亦一鈦板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.transcendence_an: 為錘、為砧、為具、為目鏡、亦為椎
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.transmission_pol: 構築電域，輸電之距捌塊也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.tungsten_pressur: 出赤石之號以上實體之禦焱者之數者也，亦一鎢板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.uranium_pressure: 出赤石之號以上物之極小損率者也，亦一鈾板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.weathered_copper: 增赤石之號隨壓之時者也，亦一銅板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.item.zinc_pressure_pl: 出赤石之號以上生物之極大命率者也，亦一鋅板也
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.eternal: 千古：不壞而免焱火堪爆、弗損於仙人掌，甚無恙於時川而獨存於太虛
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.merciless: 無情：禁特淬靈外之全靈【押%s覽之】而化其為擊力掘速
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.merciless.sh: 無情：禁特淬靈外之全靈（押%s視之）而化其為擊力掘速
tooltip.anvilcraft.property.providence: 吉星：有多喚靈【押%s以覽之】之可
tooltip.anvilcraft.redstone.title: 赤石計：
